title: stenogyne viridis
intro: Stenogyne viridis, also known as the Green Stenogyne or Hawaiian Mountain Ginger, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Stenogyne viridis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
